code:
import io
import string
import list

fn contains_string(_ xs: List<String>, _ target: String) -> Bool
  mut i = 0
  mut found = false
  while i < xs.len()
    let item = xs.get(i)
    match item
    when Some(s)
      if s == target
        found = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  found
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut seen: List<String> = []
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = tokens.get(i)
    match tok
    when Some(token)
      if not contains_string(seen, token)
        seen = list.push(seen, token)
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("unique=#{count}")
end
